prompt: I've been manually running the same 5-step process for onboarding new team members for the past 6 months. I want to make this repeatable so any lead can do it consistently. The steps are: 1) Create dev environment access, 2) Walk through codebase structure, 3) Assign first ticket, 4) Pair on first PR, 5) Schedule 1-on-1 feedback. Can you help me turn this into a skill?

assertions.name: has_verification_risks
assertions.description: Has Verification > Risks and failure modes

assertions.name: has_lessons_prompting
assertions.description: Has Lessons learned > Prompting and coordination

assertions.name: has_skill_proposal
assertions.description: Has Skill update proposal with draft skill
assertions.check: Contains '### Skill update proposal' with skill draft
